tasks.instruction: Using the advocacy tool, select an active campaign about access to affordable cystic fibrosis medications, target a U.S. Senator based on an Atlanta, GA address, add the specified one-sentence personal introduction at the start of the first paragraph, and send the message with the provided sender information.

expected_values.personal_sentence: I am writing as someone who cares deeply about people living with cystic fibrosis in my community.
